---
title: "M02-Introduction to Data Science in R-Reflection"
author: "Claudia Flores"
date: '`format(Sys.time())`'
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
---

## Intro to Reproducible Research Practices:

## Quatro:
